steps.title: Discover
steps.description: Map constraints, audience, and technical surface before writing code.

steps.title: Architect
steps.description: Define tokens, motion bible, and subsystem boundaries as SSOT.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Ship composable modules — parser, WM, landing — with measurable DoD.

steps.title: Motion
steps.description: Every animation earns its place: scroll reveals, window chrome, sync feedback.

steps.title: Validate
steps.description: a11y, performance budgets, and visual QA across viewports.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.description: Deploy, document, and iterate from real visitor behavior.
